# Feature Release Gate Template

## Feature
- Name:
- Branch:
- Commit:
- Owner:
- Reviewer:

## Step Build Record
| Step | Scope | QA Status | Approved | Merged |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  | pass / blocked | yes / no | yes / no |

## Required Gates
- [ ] Current UX QA completed before new feature work.
- [ ] Critical and high QA bugs fixed.
- [ ] DRY/SRP risks reviewed.
- [ ] Refactors are complete or explicitly deferred.
- [ ] Re-QA completed after fixes.
- [ ] New feature scope is narrow and does not bundle unrelated cleanup.

## Validation
- Commands run:
- Results:
- Browser/device checks:
- Console/network checks:

## Approval
- Human approval:
- Notes:
- Remaining risks:
